title: No, or the Vain Glory of Command
original_title: 'Non', ou a Vã Glória de Mandar
overview: Episodes from throughout the entire military history of Portugal are told through flashbacks as a conscripted student of history recounts them to his fellow soldiers while they march through an African colony in revolt during 1973.
